description_long: This is a large, modern combat tactical vehicle resembling a military patrol boat or armored watercraft. The hull is streamlined and angular, with multiple decks and a raised superstructure at the center, likely for command and control. The exterior features railings, hatches, and what appear to be reinforced panels, suggesting armored protection. The vessel is equipped with several visible mounts and platforms, possibly for weaponry or surveillance equipment, and has a robust, utilitarian design. The color scheme is primarily a mix of muted grays and browns, with a smooth, metallic finish. The overall build is solid and imposing, designed for durability and operational versatility in urban or littoral environments.
description: A large, armored combat patrol boat with angular hull, multiple decks, and visible mounts for equipment or weaponry. The exterior is finished in muted grays and browns with a robust, metallic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed bow, central superstructure, and the symmetry of the hull with visible railings and deck details.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the vessel, multiple decks, raised superstructure, and several mounts or platforms along the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the wide stern, layered deck structure, and the arrangement of railings and possible access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the vessel's length, deck levels, and additional mounts or platforms.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Three visible mounts: one on the forward deck, one atop the central superstructure, and one at the rear deck, all suitable for machine guns or similar weaponry.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with visible reinforced, angular panels along the hull and superstructure; thickness appears substantial, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; exterior is finished in solid gray and brown tones.
